## Known Baselines

- post-hoc Sinkhorn: `F1=0.2222`
- aligned Mahalanobis: `TP/FP/TN/FN=4/4/33/2`, `F1=0.5714`, `AUC=0.9099`
- exp4 current best M1+M2: `TP/FP/TN/FN=6/3/34/0`, `F1=0.8000`

## Initial Conclusion

- Best F1 in this benchmark: `bures`, `F1=0.0000`, `TP/FP/TN/FN=0/2/35/6`.
- Best ranking AUC: `bures`, `AUC=0.6126`, `PR-AUC=0.2375`.
- Methods exceeding post-hoc Sinkhorn by F1: `[]`.
- Methods exceeding aligned Mahalanobis by F1: `[]`.
- Methods reaching current M1+M2 best by F1: `[]`.

Under the default benchmark policy (`threshold_quantile=0.95`, high-score anomaly direction), all methods miss the 6 abnormal exp4 samples (`TP=0`), so none is ready to replace M1+M2. Bures / trace distance / QRE show modest ranking signal but still far below aligned Mahalanobis and M1+M2.

## Next Step

Do not run full exp1-exp4 from this result. If continuing, first run a focused exp4 diagnostic over threshold direction/quantile and local reference variants, especially for Bures / trace distance / QRE.
